mapper.select: select sys_id , coupon_cd , coupon_nm , start_date , end_date, use_yn from sys_payment_coupon spc where 1=1 delete_yn = 'N' order by sys_id desc

select count(*) > 0 from sys_payment_coupon where 1=1 and coupon_cd in
#{item.couponCd}

select sys_id , coupon_cd , coupon_nm , start_date , end_date, use_yn from sys_payment_coupon spc where 1=1 delete_yn = 'N' and coupon_cd in
#{item.couponCd}

select sys_id , coupon_cd , coupon_nm , start_date , end_date, use_yn from sys_payment_coupon spc where 1=1 delete_yn = 'N' and coupon_cd in
#{item.couponCd}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_payment_coupon ( sys_id , coupon_cd, coupon_nm, start_date, end_date, use_yn, delete_yn, insert_user_id, insert_datetime, sys_plant_cd ) values
( #{item.sysId}, #{item.couponCd}, #{item.couponNm}, #{item.startDate}, #{item.endDate}, #{item.useYn}, 'N', #{userId}, now(), #{sysPlantCd} )

update.foreach: update sys_payment_coupon set coupon_nm = #{item.couponNm}, start_date = #{item.startDate}, end_date = #{item.endDate}, use_yn = #{item.useYn}, modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id = #{item.sysId}

mapper.delete:
update sys_payment_coupon set delete_yn = 'Y', modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id in
#{item.sysId}
